title: TejuinoCraft
description: A refined and optimized vanilla experience for Fabric. This modpack combines technical improvements, extreme performance and advanced tools like Litematica, MiniHUD and ReplayMod, ideal for technical players, builders, casuals and even creators!
body: TejuinoCraft's official modpack, focused on a refined vanilla experience optimized for Fabric. This modpack combines technical improvements, extreme performance and advanced tools such as Litematics, MiniHUD and ReplayMod, ideal for technical players, builders and casuals or creators. Enjoy a more fluid, configurable and powerful Minecraft, without losing the essence of the original game: D
